meaning: 这首诗描写了诗人在安静的夜晚，看到床前的月光，以为是地上的霜。他抬起头看着天上的明月，低下头想起了远方的家乡。
styleDescription: Classical Chinese ink wash painting style, soft watercolor tones, gentle lighting, cute and whimsical childlike elements, minimalist composition, high quality, 8k resolution

scenes.title: 宁静的夜晚
scenes.description: 画面展示一个古朴的小院，夜空深邃宁静，一轮明月高悬，几颗星星眨着眼睛。院子里有竹子和简单的石凳，营造出安静祥和的氛围。
scenes.prompt: A quiet ancient Chinese courtyard at night, deep blue sky with twinkling stars and a bright full moon, bamboo shadows on the ground, simple stone bench, classical Chinese ink wash style, soft colors, peaceful atmosphere, child-friendly illustration, Wide shot, establishing the setting with a focus on the moon and tranquility., Classical Chinese ink wash painting style, soft watercolor tones, gentle lighting, cute and whimsical childlike elements, minimalist composition, high quality, 8k resolution
scenes.narration: 夜深了，月亮挂在天上。在一个安静的夜晚，诗人李白睡不着觉，走到了院子里。
scenes.compositionHint: Wide shot, establishing the setting with a focus on the moon and tranquility.

scenes.title: 床前明月光
scenes.description: 镜头拉近到窗边或床边，明亮的月光像流水一样洒在地板上，形成一片银白色的光斑。光影柔和，带有梦幻感。
scenes.prompt: Close up of a wooden floor inside a room, bright moonlight streaming through the window creating silver patterns on the floor, soft glowing light, classical Chinese ink style, serene mood, detailed texture of wood and light, Medium close-up, focusing on the interplay of light and shadow on the floor., Classical Chinese ink wash painting style, soft watercolor tones, gentle lighting, cute and whimsical childlike elements, minimalist composition, high quality, 8k resolution
scenes.narration: 明亮的月光洒在窗前，就像地上铺了一层白白的霜，亮晶晶的，真漂亮。
scenes.compositionHint: Medium close-up, focusing on the interplay of light and shadow on the floor.

scenes.title: 疑是地上霜
scenes.description: 李白穿着宽松的睡衣，揉着惺忪的睡眼，低头看着地上的月光，表情疑惑又好奇。月光看起来确实像寒冷的霜一样洁白。
scenes.prompt: Li Bai, a cute ancient Chinese boy/young man in loose pajamas, rubbing his sleepy eyes, looking down curiously at the moonlight on the floor, expression of confusion and wonder, soft moonlight glow, classical ink wash style, gentle and innocent, Over-the-shoulder shot or side profile, capturing Li Bai's reaction to the 'frost'., Classical Chinese ink wash painting style, soft watercolor tones, gentle lighting, cute and whimsical childlike elements, minimalist composition, high quality, 8k resolution
scenes.narration: 李白揉了揉眼睛，心想：‘咦？这地上怎么会有白白的霜呢？’原来那是美丽的月光呀。
scenes.compositionHint: Over-the-shoulder shot or side profile, capturing Li Bai's reaction to the 'frost'.

scenes.title: 举头望明月
scenes.description: 李白抬起头，仰望着天空中那轮圆圆的、金黄的明月。他的眼神充满向往和思念。背景可以是淡淡的云彩衬托着明月。
scenes.prompt: Li Bai looking up at the large, bright, golden full moon in the dark blue sky, soft clouds around the moon, nostalgic and longing expression, classical Chinese ink brush style, elegant and poetic, soft lighting, Low angle shot looking up at Li Bai and the moon, emphasizing the connection between the person and the sky., Classical Chinese ink wash painting style, soft watercolor tones, gentle lighting, cute and whimsical childlike elements, minimalist composition, high quality, 8k resolution
scenes.narration: 李白抬起头，看着天上圆圆的月亮。月亮好圆好亮啊，照亮了整个夜空。
scenes.compositionHint: Low angle shot looking up at Li Bai and the moon, emphasizing the connection between the person and the sky.

scenes.title: 低头思故乡
scenes.description: 李白低下头，双手抱胸或扶着栏杆，神情变得温柔而略带忧伤。画面中隐约浮现出家乡的山山水水或亲人的剪影（虚化处理），表达深深的思念之情。
scenes.prompt: Li Bai bowing his head gently, hands clasped, looking sad and thoughtful, soft background blur showing hints of hometown mountains and family silhouettes, emotional and warm tone, classical Chinese ink style, sentimental atmosphere, Close-up on Li Bai's face and upper body, focusing on his emotional state and the feeling of missing home., Classical Chinese ink wash painting style, soft watercolor tones, gentle lighting, cute and whimsical childlike elements, minimalist composition, high quality, 8k resolution
scenes.narration: 看着月亮，李白低下头，想起了远方的家乡和爸爸妈妈。月亮这么圆，但他却回不去家，心里有点想念家乡的味道。
scenes.compositionHint: Close-up on Li Bai's face and upper body, focusing on his emotional state and the feeling of missing home.
